title: Fermented Gooey German Tortillas Quesadilla
description: A decadent twist on traditional quesadillas, featuring gooey cheese and fermented beech mushrooms, all wrapped up in German-style tortillas.

ingredients.name: Fermented beech mushrooms (200g)
ingredients.notes: use a food processor to finely chop

ingredients.name: Butter (4tbsp)
ingredients.notes: salted or unsalted, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: Salt (to taste)
ingredients.notes: flaky or fine, whichever suits your taste

instructions: Heat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Melt 2 tablespoons of butter and sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the fermented beech mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Sprinkle the gouda cheese over the mushroom mixture and stir until melted and gooey.
Warm the German-style tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the quesadillas by placing a quarter of the mushroom and cheese mixture onto half of each tortilla.
Fold the tortillas in half to enclose the filling.
Place the quesadillas in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
